content.en:
For Ye Tian, obtaining the secret technique of the Will World this time was the biggest gain, even more precious than various rare resources.

Ye Tian didn't break through the sixth layer, if he wanted to break through the sixth layer, the strength of the two-pole realm and the half-step eternal realm would not work, I was afraid that he would need the three-pole realm.

Therefore, Ye Tian gave up breaking into the sixth layer and came out directly.

When he came out, the True River Sword Ancestor and the others were no longer here, obviously leaving.

Traceless Mountain is not only the two treasures of Donghui Mountain and Traceless Tower, but also other treasures, so the True River Sword Ancestor and they don't want to waste time.

Soon, Ye Tian came to another treasure place in the Traceless Mountain, the Forbidden Heaven Monument!

The Forbidden Heaven Monument is the greatest opportunity for the Traceless Mountain, and the Forbidden Heaven Monument is not to improve one's control over the eternal rules or the innate eternal rules, but to be able to comprehend the mystery of the integration of the body and the innate eternal rules.

It was too difficult for the body to fuse with the innate eternal rules, and many Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses couldn't figure out the direction at all, but the Forbidden Heaven Monument was of some help.

Of course, this so-called help can only increase the success rate by less than one percent, but it is very good.

If there are more opportunities like this, wouldn't there be hope for promotion to the Eternal Realm?

Therefore, the Forbidden Heaven Monument was very precious to the Half-Step Eternal Realm, but it was a pity that they could not take the Forbidden Heaven Monument.

And the Eternal Realm is estimated to not be able to look down on the Forbidden Heaven Monument, or it may not be able to take away the Forbidden Heaven Monument, resulting in the Forbidden Heaven Monument always existing in the Traceless Mountain in the Traceless Territory.

The Forbidden Heaven Monument is located at the top of the Forbidden Heaven Peak of the Traceless Mountain, and there are many space-time dragon pythons here.

At this time.

A famous half-step Eternal Realm arranged a formation to resist the attack of the space-time dragon python, so that the other half-step Eternal Realm could comprehend the Forbidden Heaven Monument with peace of mind, and everyone cooperated to comprehend.

"I actually cooperated to participate in the Forbidden Heaven Monument!"

Ye Tian didn't expect that these half-step Eternal Realm existences would cooperate, but when he thought of not cooperating, he couldn't comprehend with peace of mind at all, and the Forbidden Heaven Monument couldn't help but control the space-time dragon python from approaching, so if there was no one to protect him, it would be to seek death if he didn't have anyone to protect him.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian also participated in it, but he was a late joiner, so naturally he could not be qualified to participate in the Forbidden Heaven Monument at the first time, and it was the turn of the next batch.

After a long time, it was the turn of Ye Tian, a group of strong men, to comprehend the Forbidden Heaven Monument.

The Forbidden Heaven Monument is not very large, it is only 100 meters high, it is purple, and there is a special purple circle around it, and within the range of the aperture, you can use the Forbidden Heaven Monument to comprehend the mystery of the fusion of the body and the innate eternal rules.

At this time.

Many half-step Eternal Realms have taken out resources from all over the place to assist in enlightenment to help them quickly attain enlightenment.

And Ye Tian's doppelganger didn't carry any resources, so he could only rely on himself.

Bang!!!!

In perception, wisps of innate eternal rules continue to evolve and slowly merge with life, which is demonstrating the process of merging various kinds of life with innate eternal rules.

Soon, one life collapsed and died in the fusion, and the fusion of billions of lives all failed and failed, but a few lives succeeded in merging and were promoted to the eternal realm.

"The Forbidden Heaven Monument actually shows the fusion process in a special way, allowing the half-step Eternal Realm to comprehend!"

Only then did Ye Tian understand why the Forbidden Heaven Monument had the effect of assisting fusion.

Looking at it like this, even a fool can gain something!

However, this straightforward approach does work and can be useful.

Ye Tian was also quickly immersed in enlightenment, and even substituted himself into it, but it was a pity that these beings who fused with the innate eternal rules were not using their own bodies as the test objects.

And everyone's body is different, the innate eternal rules that have been realized are also different, and the way and difficulty of integration are also different.

Therefore, these examples of fusion cannot be completely combined, and only a little bit of harvest can be made.

Of course.

The Forbidden Heaven Monument still allows the Half-Step Eternal Realm to have a deeper understanding and perception of its own eternal rules or innate eternal rules, which is also one of the gains.

"It's a pity that it doesn't help me much!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He might as well use the copy body to try to fuse again and again in the future, and find experience from countless failures, which will definitely be more useful than visiting the Forbidden Heaven Monument.

But the other half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses didn't have such means as him, so they naturally couldn't do that, so they could only use treasures like the Forbidden Heaven Monument to seek hope again and again.

After contemplating it for some years, Ye Tian gave up the Forbidden Heaven Monument and chose to leave here.

After that, he was everywhere in the Traceless Mountain, and he also had some gains.

For example, there are traces of the Eternal Realm fight somewhere in the Traceless Mountain, and the traces still exist today, and you can also feel the mystery of the Eternal Realm moves.

Another example is that there are rows of stone statues in the Traceless Mountain, these stone statues contain some inheritance, and if you feel it carefully, you can also feel some eternal skills.

However, this is only helpful for the general half-step Eternal Realm, those ordinary half-step Eternal Realms have not comprehended the Eternal Technique, so they want to obtain some Eternal Technique inheritance, and use other Eternal Techniques to create their own Eternal Technique.

But Ye Tian has a lot of eternal skills, so he can't look down on such a inheritance.

One treasure after another was quite disappointing for Ye Tian.

I have to say that his vision is now high, and he can't see the benefits here.

"The Traceless Territory has been discovered a long time ago, I don't know how many half-step Eternal Realms have entered here, and the benefits of being able to stay are too few. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But this time, his biggest gain still belonged to the two chances of the Rift Valley and the Will World, followed by treasures like the Void God Leaf.

In the past few years, the True River Sword Ancestor and the others invited Ye Tian to collect resources in certain territories of the Traceless Territory, as long as they withstood the attack of the space-time dragon python, they could snatch some of the resources born here.

As long as you don't go to the boundless sea, there is actually a lot of hope to save your life.

But there will definitely be strong people who will go to the Endless Sea, such as those half-step Eternal Realms of the Five or Six Extreme Realms, and it is estimated that they will join forces to break into the Endless Sea and snatch those extremely precious resources.

Ye Tian rejected the True River Sword Ancestor's proposal, he had no interest in these now.

At this time.

Ye Tian was trying to cultivate the Will World in Rift Valley, and the clone had also returned here.

In fact, the doppelganger, like the copy body, both have the copy talent, and even if one of them falls, the copy talent can be copied again.

Therefore, he can continuously try to cultivate the world of will, and he is not afraid of falling.

And the environment of Rift Valley is just right for the world of wills, and it is the best place.

The wind of the Rift Wind Valley tempers the will, and the will world enhances the will, the two are perfectly combined, but without a single life, even the Traceless Lord would not dare to cultivate so wildly, but Ye Tian wouldn't dare.

this day.

When Ye Tian was cultivating in the world of will, there was a problem with his will, which caused problems in his body.

In addition, as soon as the wind of the Rift Valley blew, the will collapsed, and the physical body began to disintegrate.

Suddenly, the doppelganger dissipated.

"The doppelganger has fallen, make another copy!"

Ye Tian sped up time, and soon he could condense a body again and start cultivating again.

I don't know how long it has been, and the True River Sword Ancestor has sent a message.

"Endless Ancestor, the entrance is closing, we have to leave!"

Ye Tian immediately replied to him: "True River Sword Ancestor, I came in as a clone, and I didn't carry any treasures, so I'm not going to go out, I'm going to cultivate here for a few more days!"

The True River Sword Ancestor didn't persuade Ye Tian anymore, he guessed that Ye Tian was cultivating in the Rifting Wind Valley.

But after cultivating for a long time, the clone can't hold on, and he still has to come out, and once he comes out, he will withstand the attack of the space-time dragon python, and he still can't live.

Therefore, it can only stay a few more days and is of little use.

However, he also knew that Ye Tian was just a clone, and the loss was not too big, so he did not persuade him.

Soon, a famous half-step Eternal Realm left the Traceless Territory, leaving only Ye Tian alone.
